[Triple Drop Campaign Preview]

Starting 8/7 (Mon), Commissions rewards will be tripled! 
Don't miss out this chance to get Activity Reports and Credit Points!

🗓️Period: 8/7 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 8/14 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
